subject: Application for Remote Frontend Developer Position
body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Remote Frontend Developer position at [Company Name]. With my skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React, I am confident in my ability to deliver high-quality front-end development work.

I have attached my resume and a portfolio of my work for your review.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further.

Best regards,
Kamrun Nahar
